basics.name: Jarosław Wałach
basics.label: Senior Full Stack Engineer (Backend-focused) | DevOps & Cloud
basics.summary: Senior Full Stack Engineer with 7+ years of experience building and modernizing production systems. Specialized in backend development (Java, Spring Boot) with strong frontend skills (React, TypeScript) and hands-on DevOps experience (AWS, Terraform, Kubernetes). Proven track record in migrating legacy applications, working in low-documentation environments, and introducing CI/CD improvements that streamline delivery.

work.name: DPDgroup IT Solutions Poland
highlights: Led migration of 3 legacy applications (PHP, Spring + Thymeleaf monoliths) into modern architecture (Angular, Spring Boot, batch processing)
Executed multiple migration strategies: gradual frontend replacement with REST wrapper (strangler pattern), full system rewrite, and ownership of inherited application
Reconstructed system behavior in low-documentation environment, identifying business-critical flows and separating defects from intended functionality
Owned end-to-end delivery of features across frontend (Angular), backend (Spring Boot), and CI/CD pipelines (GitLab)
Introduced GitLab CI/CD pipelines, eliminating ~30 minutes of daily manual deployment effort and standardizing release process
Designed and implemented REST APIs for integration with external systems

work.name: DPDgroup IT Solutions Poland
work.summary: Full-time · 2 yrs · Warsaw, Mazowieckie, Poland · Hybrid
highlights: Built and maintained enterprise Java applications powering logistics operations
Developed responsive web interfaces using React and Angular with TypeScript
Integrated multiple third-party systems through REST APIs

work.name: The Stepstone Group Polska
work.summary: Full-time · 1 yr 3 mos · Warsaw, Mazowieckie, Poland · Hybrid
highlights: Managed and extended AWS infrastructure using Terraform and Terragrunt across multiple environments
Contributed to Terragrunt adoption, improving infrastructure consistency and environment management
Automated infrastructure provisioning and configuration with Ansible
Proposed and implemented infrastructure optimization reducing costs by ~$1000/month by consolidating DNS services
Maintained infrastructure for legacy applications, including storage scaling to support system stability
Operated HashiCorp stack (Nomad, Consul, Vault) for service orchestration and secrets management

work.name: The Stepstone Group Polska
highlights: Developed frontend features for high-traffic recruitment platform serving millions of users
Built and maintained reusable React component library adopted across multiple brand applications
Collaborated with backend teams to design and integrate REST APIs
Worked in Agile environment delivering features and fixes across multiple applications

work.name: The Stepstone Group Polska
highlights: Developed React components for high-traffic recruitment platform
Contributed to Agile ceremonies including code reviews and sprint planning

work.name: Betacom S.A.

Developed Python automation scripts streamlining deployment workflows
Supported CI/CD pipelines ensuring reliable software delivery

work.name: Betacom S.A.

Built developer tooling improving team productivity

work.name: Betacom S.A.
highlights: Built SharePoint components using JavaScript and React framework

references.name: Dileep Gowdappa — Senior DevOps Engineer (CKA | CKS | AWS | Azure | Ansible | Terraform | Kubernetes | ECS | Consul | Vault)
references.reference: I worked with Jarosław in a team where we were developing a Infrastructure for Global platform in Stepstone group which manages multiple Job portal brands across different countries. He has very good knowledge on AWS and IaC (Terraform, Ansible) and Hashicorp stack (Nomad, Consul, Vault). He is asset to any team and very good team player.

references.name: Mirosław Karczmarczyk — IT Management & Leadership Coach
references.reference: Jarek is a hard-working and dedicated person. He always pays attention to details and is not afraid of new things. He likes to experiment. With high analytical skills, he is able to solve almost every problem. Excellent team player and always eager to support other team mates. I was really happy to have him in my team.

projects.name: NixOS Configuration & Development Environment
projects.description: Declarative system and development environment configuration using Nix, focusing on reproducibility and developer productivity
highlights: Built reproducible development environments using Nix and NixOS
Designed modular configuration for system and developer tooling
Explored Nix-based tooling for Neovim setup
